theme: The science behind team building that actually works

linkedin.text:
Most team building is a waste of money. There, we said it.

Trust falls. Icebreakers. Escape rooms where half the team is checking their phone.

Here's what the research actually shows works:
📊 Shared novel experiences raise team cohesion 67% (Harvard Business Review)
📊 Physical challenges together release oxytocin — the trust hormone
📊 Informal meals beat formal meetings 3:1 for cross-department collaboration
📊 Teams that travel together resolve conflict 41% better

The formula isn't complicated: new environment + genuine challenge + shared achievement = lasting bonds.

That's what we design. 200+ events across 120+ countries since 2010. Zero trust falls.

📅 Comment 'GUIDE' for the research-backed framework we build programs on.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership #TeamBuilding
